title: Modules, Packages, and Dependency Boundaries · Runtime Trace: Esm Import Export
summary: Split the status coordinator into explicit browser modules and verify clean-environment loading and dependency behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js esm import export increment in a modular status application with a dependency record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use named, default, namespace, side-effect, and re-export forms with explicit public boundaries.
Handle asynchronous failures at the owning boundary and prevent floating or unhandled promises.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
